en: We did make love. Is that what you're calling it?
Just answer the question, Marla, please. Did we do it or not?
You fuck me, then snub me. You love me, you hate me.
ko: 넌 나를 성관계하고 무시해. 사랑하면서도 미워해.

en: You show me a sensitive side, then you turn into a total asshole.
ko: 너는 나에게 섬세한 면을 보여주고, 그러고는 완전한 개자식이 돼.

en: Is that a pretty accurate description of our relationship, Tyler?
ko: 이게 우리 관계에 대한 정확한 묘사인가, 타일러?

en: We have just lost cabin pressure. What did you just say?
What is wrong with you? What did you just call me? Say my name.
ko: 방금 나를 뭐라고 불렀어? 내 이름을 말해봐.

en: Tyler Durden. Tyler Durden, you fucking freak. What's going on?
ko: 타일러 더든. 타일러 더든, 이 미친 놈아.

en: I'm coming over. No, wait. Marla, I'm not there.
ko: 아니, 기다려. 마를라, 난 거기 없어.

en: You broke your promise. Jesus, Tyler.
You fucking talked to her about me. Tyler, what the fuck is going on here?
I asked you for one thing. One simple thing.
ko: 내가 너에게 한 가지 부탁했잖아. 아주 간단한 것.

en: Why do people think that I'm you? Answer me!
ko: 왜 사람들이 나를 너라고 생각하는 거지?

en: Answer me. Why do people think that I'm you? I think you know.
ko: 왜 사람들이 나를 너라고 생각하는 거지?

en: No, I don't. Yes, you do. Why would anyone possibly confuse you with me?
ko: 아니, 난 몰라. 응, 너는 알아.
